title: Create Board and Duplicate Item to that board on Status Change
excerpt: Hi, I am trying to find a way of making my staffs lives easier!  Currently when I have a status change on an item on my main board, a new board is created with the correct (customer) name and template.  What I then need …

posts.author: IainFerguson (Iain Ferguson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am trying to find a way of making my staffs lives easier! Currently when I have a status change on an item on my main board, a new board is created with the correct (customer) name and template. What I then need is for the item to then be duplicated on to the new board and mirrored. My issue is that for all the automations I can see, I need the name of the new board (which I get) and of course I don’t know the name of the new board until it is made. I can see how to do it as a two step process manually but it would be good to automate it.

For info, I need a board each time as each board is for a new customer and a new Sub-contractor (guest) will be given access.

Any help would be much appreciated. Thank you.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @IainFerguson
Welcome to the community.

The Duplicates and Uniques app might be able to help you out here. Here is a video of how.
If you have any questions, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com
